parameters.query:
WITH ranked_procedure_list AS (
    SELECT
        p.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.procedure_list_id ORDER BY p.createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        mes.history_procedure_list p
    WHERE
        p.procedure_list_id = {{ $json.query.procedure_list_id }} 
        AND p.status = '1'
),
latest_procedure_list AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        ranked_procedure_list
    WHERE
        rn = 1
),
expanded_procedure_list AS (
    SELECT
        r.procedure_list_id,
        r.procedure_list_name,
        r.createtime,
        r.user_id,
        r.product_model_id,
        r.version,
        (x.value)::int AS procedure_detail_id,
        x.ord AS procedure_detail_ord
    FROM latest_procedure_list r
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(
        r.procedure_detail_id::jsonb -> 'procedure_detail_id'
    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS x(value, ord)
),
aggregated_change_history AS (
    SELECT
        p.procedure_list_id,
        ARRAY_AGG(p.change_reason ORDER BY p.createtime DESC) AS change_reasons,
        ARRAY_AGG(p.createtime ORDER BY p.createtime DESC) AS change_dates
    FROM
        ranked_procedure_list p
    WHERE
        p.procedure_list_id = {{ $json.query.procedure_list_id }} 
    GROUP BY
        p.procedure_list_id
),
latest_history_procedure AS (
    SELECT
        hpd.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hpd.procedure_detail_id ORDER BY hpd.createtime DESC) AS rn
    FROM
        mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
)
SELECT
    epl.procedure_list_id,
    epl.procedure_list_name,
    epl.version,
    ac.change_reasons,
    ac.change_dates,
    m.product_model_name,
    pd.procedure_detail_id,
    pd.procedure_name,
    pd.current_version,
    pd.common_proocedure,
    hpd.procedure_type,
    hpd.standard_labor,
    hpd.standard_people,
    hpd.cycle_time,
    hpd.procedure_dataupload,
    hpd.procedure_scheduling,
    hpd.checkrule
FROM
    expanded_procedure_list epl
JOIN
    aggregated_change_history ac ON epl.procedure_list_id = ac.procedure_list_id
JOIN
    mes.product_model m ON epl.product_model_id = m.product_model_id
JOIN
    mes.procedure_detail pd ON epl.procedure_detail_id = pd.procedure_detail_id
JOIN
    latest_history_procedure hpd ON pd.procedure_detail_id = hpd.procedure_detail_id
WHERE
    hpd.rn = 1
ORDER BY epl.procedure_detail_ord;

parameters.jsCode:
return items[0].json.result.map((procedure, index) => ({
   NO: `C${index + 1}`,
   产品型号: procedure.product_model_name, // 添加这一行
   工序名称: procedure.procedure_name,
   版本: procedure.current_version,
   是否为通用工序: procedure.common_proocedure_description,
   工序类型: procedure.procedure_type_description,
   标准工时: procedure.standard_labor,
   标准人力: procedure.standard_people,
   节时工拍: procedure.cycle_time,
   是否需要上传数据: procedure.procedure_dataupload_description,
   工序分类:procedure.procedure_scheduling_description,
   文件编号:procedure.version,
   变更原因:procedure.change_reasons,
   变更日期:procedure.change_dates,
   是否校验前置所有工序: procedure.checkrule_description
}));
